text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Navigator Programs * AIDS/HIV Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT PARTNERSHIP PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive client-centered HIV case management services. Ensures individuals have access to health insurance and other allied health and support services that assist them in maintaining focus with on-going health and medical care. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their family members Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 346-4400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT MINORITY AIDS INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals obtain insurance, access medical and mental health care, substance abuse services, housing, and other services. Offers intensive and culturally appropriate services. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Refugees and immigrants living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 731-9593 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT
